title: cyclosorus ferox
intro: Cyclosorus ferox, also known as the saw-sedge fern, is a species of fern found in tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its distinctive saw-edged leaves. Traditionally, Cyclosorus ferox is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus ferox can be used in teas, infusions, or dried as a powder for medicinal purposes.
